$comment: The Exchange (design §9): the silent barter caravan. Rates derive from the single trade-value table (resources.json values + recipe derivation), never authored per pair — exchangeRate(a->b) = tradeValue(a)/tradeValue(b)*(1-spread). Trades are exact (goods are fractional): rounding UP would mint value on a round trip, so the spread is the only cut. There is no Coin — goods buy goods; off-zone inputs (berries for nuts) are its real job. spread is a first guess.
